title: Juvenile Preserve
description: This mod lets juvenile mobs stay in their tiny form permanently with a simple process.
body:
Upset of your carefully raised baby mobs losing their adorable appearance as they grow up? This mod lets juvenile mobs (like cows, pigs and even custom mobs from other mods) stay in their tiny form permanently with a simple process.

**🛠️ How It Works: Two Simple Steps**

First, Craft the Key Item -- Poisonrot Potato: Rotten Flesh ×2 + Poisonous Potato ×1 + Pufferfish ×1.

Then, just Feed your Baby Mobs with Poisonrot Potato to Lock thier Growth. After that, the mob will stay in its current baby form permanently and won’t grow naturally over time.

**🔧 Flexible Expansion: By Adding Tags**

Add the tag "juv_preserve:dwarfedable" to any entity (including mobs from other mods), and then you will find that the baby form of this entity could be affected by Poisonrot Potato.
